response.step_by_step_log: 1. Initial scan identified two distinct musical segments: 00:00-00:34 (short song) and 00:53-04:59 (main song). 2. For the main song (00:53), I identified metadata from on-screen text: Title: '恋におちて -Fall in love-', Composer: 小林明子 (Akiko Kobayashi). 3. Searched for lyrics using '恋におちて Fall in love 小林明子 歌詞'. Found complete Japanese and English lyrics on UtaNet and UtaTen. 4. For the first song (00:00), identified as 'It's Love' via on-screen text and audio. Searched for 'It's Love song lyrics' and confirmed it's 'It's Love' by The Rascals. 5. Mapped scenes chronologically based on content. 6. Generated JSON with full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a short performance of 'It's Love' by the performers Marin and Korone, followed by a full vocal performance of the song '恋におちて -Fall in love-' (Fall in Love) by the VTuber Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame.

scenes.description: The video starts with a dance performance by Marin and Korone to the song 'It's Love'. The text 'IT'S LOVE' is displayed in the top-left corner.

scenes.description: The performers conclude the first dance segment, followed by a short transition scene with some talking.

The main performance begins with the song '恋におちて -Fall in love-'. Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame sings while dancing on stage with backup performers. Text identifies the song title, lyricist, and composer.
